A moment of silence

WordPress
is dead.

It had a 22-year run. Powered 43% of the web. Survived Gutenberg, Jetpack, and a thousand "Hello Dolly" jokes. But Claude just generated this entire landing page in one prompt — no plugins, no databases, no PHP, no wp-admin. Just HTML.

See the prompt that built this → Compare the corpses
R · I · P
WordPress
2003 — 2026
"Just one more plugin and it'll be fast."
The verdict

Static HTML didn't kill WordPress. Claude did.

For two decades, the answer to "I need a website" was "spin up WordPress." Now the answer is "describe it." One prompt produces a fully-styled, responsive, accessible site that loads in under a second and costs $0 to host.

⚡

Loads instantly

No PHP roundtrip. No 87 database queries. No TTFB. The browser just reads the file.

🛡

Cannot be hacked

There is no admin panel. There is no login. There is no MySQL. There is nothing to compromise.

🪶

One file

HTML, CSS, and a sprinkle of JS — all in a single document. Drop it on any server. Or no server.

∞

Free forever

No managed hosting. No "WordPress VIP" invoices. GitHub Pages, Netlify, S3 — pick a free tier.

🧠

Generated, not built

You don't pick a theme. You don't install a page builder. You describe what you want, and it appears.

🚫

Zero plugins

No "Yoast SEO Premium." No "WP Rocket." No mysterious updates that break your site at 2am.

Side by side

A 30-second autopsy.

The same simple landing page, two completely different paths to ship it.

The WordPress way

  • Provision a LAMP host. Or pay for managed hosting.
  • Install WordPress. Pick a theme. Pick a different theme.
  • Install a page builder. Install 14 plugins it depends on.
  • Configure caching. Configure a CDN. Configure security.
  • Update WordPress. Update plugins. Resolve conflicts.
  • Wait 4 seconds for the homepage to load.
  • Pay $29/month, forever, for the privilege.

The Claude way

  • Describe the page in one sentence.
  • Receive a single index.html file.
  • Drag it into a browser. Done.
  • Drop it on Netlify. Live in 12 seconds.
  • It loads instantly because it is one file.
  • No updates. No maintenance. No CVEs.
  • Free.
1
Prompt
0
Plugins
0ms
DB queries
∞
Uptime
Exhibit A

The prompt that generated this site.

No code editor open. No npm install. No "what theme should I use?" Just a sentence.

~/wordpress-is-dead — claude
you ▸ Generate a static html landing page that is all about how WordPress is dead because Claude can now generate beautiful static html landing pages without wordpress.

claude ▸ Writing index.html
The CMS was a workaround for the fact that humans couldn't write HTML at scale. Now they don't have to.
— probably someone, eventually
Get started

Your next site is one prompt away.

Open Claude. Describe the page. Save the file. Ship it. The hardest part is choosing a domain name — and Claude can do that too.

Try it now → Get Claude Code

This entire site is one HTML file. View source — it's all there.

Generated by Claude. No WordPress was harmed in the making (it was already dead).
